message:
chore: bump all crate versions from 0.1.0 to 0.1.1 for crates.io republish

17 commits of fixes since initial publish (large integer precision,
WAL recovery, cache/VFS correctness, btree/vdbe fixes, etc.) warrant
a patch version bump for all 24 crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
